revisions.goal: Make awaiting Plan approvals impossible to miss and improve native and web queue usability for multiple concurrent agents and responsive repository dashboards.
revisions.acceptanceCriteria:
- A newly pending Plan actively alerts the user and opens a review surface without requiring discovery through the menu bar.
- The macOS approval surface displays multiple pending or stale Plans with clear selection, repository context, and status.
- Plan edits happen inline within the selected Plan detail without navigating to a contextless second page, while milestones and resolved checks remain visible.
- The web UI displays a prominent awaiting-Plan banner linked to actionable request details.
- Recent repositories render only complete cards that fit the available width, showing more at larger widths and never clipping a partial card.
- Native and React tests cover attention/queue selection, inline editing state, multiple requests, the banner, and responsive repository selection.
- Go, React, and macOS build/test verification passes.

milestones.title: Native attention and queue
milestones.goal: Add automatic attention behavior and a multi-request master-detail queue.

milestones.title: Inline Plan editing
milestones.goal: Keep editing within the selected Plan detail with preserved context.

milestones.title: Web pending banner and responsive repositories
milestones.goal: Surface waiting Plans and prevent partial repository cards at every width.

milestones.title: Regression verification
milestones.goal: Cover multiple agents, alert transitions, and responsive rendering in automated tests.
